Async shader compilation is essential for battle scenes
High VRAM usage benefits from DXVK memory management

notes: DXVK is recommended for better handling of large-scale battles
Lower unit sizes in battle settings for better performance
Campaign map runs smoother than real-time battles

knownIssues.description: Frame drops during large-scale battles with many units
knownIssues.workaround: Reduce unit size and detail settings; DXVK async helps significantly

knownIssues.description: Initial shader compilation causes stuttering on first battle
knownIssues.workaround: Shader cache builds over multiple battles

variants.label: DXVK + Ubisoft Connect
rationale: Divide-by-zero in upc_r2_loader64 = Ubisoft Connect launcher bug, not the game
DXVK + Ubisoft Connect winetricks helps; some users still hit the launcher loop

knownIssues.description: Ubisoft Connect launcher may divide-by-zero before reaching the game
knownIssues.workaround: Run via Ubisoft Connect helper bottle preset or skip Ubisoft Connect entirely

variants.label: DXVK D3D9 (perf)
rationale: DX9-era title; D3DMetal D3D9 path is multiple seconds per frame on Apple Silicon
DXVK D3D9 translation gives consistent perf for this older title

variants.label: Recommended
rationale: Requires working Ubisoft Connect overlay; covered by trackmania-2020 ubiconnect pattern
DXVK improves stability over wineD3D for the DX11 build

variants.label: Recommended
rationale: UE4.27 sim — msync regression in 2.3.2+ causes audio-only freeze; esync stable
DXVK on for DX12 → DX11 fallback path stability

variants.label: AVX-off
rationale: ILLEGAL_INSTRUCTION at fixed offset = AVX instruction not supported on Apple Silicon Wine
Disable AVX in bottle performance settings

entries.title: Undertale
entries.subtitle: tobyfox

variants.label: Recommended
rationale: GameMaker-based game with minimal system requirements
Runs perfectly under any Wine configuration
No special settings needed

notes: Runs flawlessly with absolutely no configuration needed
All game features including controller support work perfectly
Save files are in the expected AppData location within the Wine prefix

entries.title: Valorant
entries.subtitle: Riot Games

variants.label: Not Supported
variants.whenToUse: This game cannot run under Wine due to kernel-level anti-cheat
rationale: Vanguard anti-cheat requires a Windows kernel driver
The kernel driver cannot operate under Wine or macOS
There is no offline or anti-cheat-free mode

notes: Vanguard anti-cheat requires a Windows kernel driver that cannot run on macOS
This is a fundamental limitation; no configuration can make this game work
Consider native alternatives or cloud gaming services

knownIssues.description: Vanguard kernel-level anti-cheat prevents the game from launching
knownIssues.workaround: None; this is a fundamental incompatibility with Wine/macOS

variants.label: DXVK + corefonts
rationale: White CEF launcher pane is a known IE/font fallback issue with the Evolution Engine launcher
DXVK avoids the D3DMetal CEF rendering bug
corefonts supplies Times/Arial that the launcher's HTML expects

entries.title: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine
entries.subtitle: Relic Entertainment / THQ

variants.label: DXVK recommended
variants.whenToUse: Default configuration for the original 2011 release
rationale: DX9-era title; DXVK gives the most consistent rendering
Async shader compilation hides first-launch hitches
Game uses dxgi/d3d11 fallback on certain branches; native overrides help

notes: Original 2011 release; for 'Space Marine 2' (2024), see a separate entry once verified
Steam launches the game directly without a wrapper launcher

variants.label: Recommended
rationale: Falcom DX11 JRPG with the immediate-crash-on-launch pattern
vcrun2022 + d3dcompiler_47 unblocks DX11 device creation

variants.label: wined3d + WinXP
rationale: DDraw/D3D classic that needs the wined3d backend
WinXP version setting matches the game's expectations

variants.label: Recommended
rationale: 32-bit DX9 PS2-era port loads faster on wineD3D than DXVK on Apple Silicon
DXVK shader compile causes 2-5min loads; wineD3D bypasses
